system.notes: Flying and landing unpowered gliders and microlights (REF). Referenced by gear such as the Techjager ParaDactyl; no sourcebook defines it as a printed skill — shipped as a custom REF skill.

cp2020-augmented.provenance: Referenced by Firestorm: Stormfront (ParaDactyl '+2 to Parachuting and/or Hang-Gliding skill'); no book defines the skill, created as a REF custom skill per the 2026-07-10 ruling.
